headline: Adobe’s Agentic AI Push and Russell Index Shift Might Change The Case For Investing In Adobe (ADBE)
summary: In late June 2026, Adobe Inc. was added to several Russell value and defensive benchmarks and unveiled a broad set of AI-powered upgrades across Firefly, Creative Cloud, GenStudio and CX Enterprise, supported by a new data integration from LiveRamp for commerce media networks. Together with record fiscal second-quarter revenue and a raised full-year outlook, these moves highlight Adobe’s push to position its agentic AI platform as core infrastructure for both individual creators and large...
